articles.title: Recent homes sales in Greater Boston (April 8)
articles.description:
ABINGTON 854 Brockton Ave. One-family conventional, built in 1900, 1,584 square feet, 6 rooms, 2 bedrooms, 1 bath, on 10,871-square-foot lot. $550,000 14 Doris Drive. One-family Cape Cod, built in 1951, 1,623 square feet, 7 rooms, 3 bedrooms, 2 baths, on 7,350-square-foot lot. $515,000 ACTON 79 Charter Road. One-family Colonial, built in 1950, 2,652 square […]

The post Recent homes sales in Greater Boston (April 8) appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Abington home at 854 Brockton Ave sold for $550,000 on April 8.
Acton property at 79 Charter Road, built in 1950, sold for $650,000.
Recent sales indicate rising home prices in Greater Boston, affecting local buyers.
